wins_analysis: No wins today as zero recommendations were generated. The system produced no trades despite a favorable trending_up regime with Nifty gaining +0.8%.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the critical failure is that the AI model was unavailable and the zone score fallback system generated zero setups. This means the fallback logic is either too restrictive or not functioning properly on trending days.
regime_impact: Today's trending_up regime with ADX=25 and low VIX=13.2 was ideal for momentum/demand-zone BUY trades. The system completely missed this opportunity by generating zero recommendations — the regime would have helped significantly if any trades had been placed.

improvements.action: Debug and fix the zone score fallback system — lower the minimum zone score threshold from current level to 65 for trending_up days with ADX>=22 and VIX<15
improvements.reason: Zero setups found across all 50 Nifty stocks on a strong trending day indicates the fallback parameters are miscalibrated or the fallback pipeline has a bug preventing any output

improvements.action: Add a regime-aware minimum output rule: if regime is trending_up and ADX>=22, force at least 3-5 BUY recommendations from stocks nearest their demand zones even if scores are below normal threshold
improvements.reason: A system that produces zero trades on a +0.8% trending day with low volatility is leaving guaranteed edge on the table

improvements.action: Implement a momentum-based secondary scanner that triggers when AI is unavailable — rank Nifty 50 stocks by proximity to VWAP or 20EMA pullback and select top 5 for BUY entries
improvements.reason: The AI unavailability caused complete system failure; a secondary rule-based scanner would prevent zero-trade days in favorable conditions

improvements.action: Pre-identify tomorrow's top 10 stocks with strongest demand zones within 0.5-1.5% below current price: scan RELIANCE, INFY, TCS, HDFCBANK, ICICIBANK, BHARTIARTL, LT, SBIN, AXISBANK, MARUTI for BUY setups
improvements.reason: With regime likely continuing trending_up (ADX=25 is sustained), pre-screening ensures the system has candidates ready even if AI remains unavailable

improvements.action: Set entry orders 0.3-0.5% below previous close for BUY setups on trending days to catch morning dips, with SL at 1.2% and target at 2% for a 1:1.7 risk-reward
improvements.reason: Trending_up regime with low VIX typically produces morning pullbacks that recover — this entry timing captures those moves

tomorrow_focus: Ensure the fallback scanner is operational and produces at least 5 BUY recommendations targeting demand zone pullbacks in the continuing uptrend, prioritizing large-cap leaders showing relative strength.

symbol_notes.BHARTIARTL.NS: Strong trending stock — look for demand zone BUY near 20EMA pullback
symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Monitor for pullback to demand zone in continued uptrend for BUY setup
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Banking sector likely benefiting from low VIX regime — watch for pullback entries
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: IT sector momentum — check if demand zone aligns with trend continuation
